title: Language overlays as a general dialect mechanism, not just i18n
description: The per-language overlay loader (schema-aware deep merge) already solves the general problem of 'persona spec + variant = specialized spec'. Generalize it: overlays aren't just for translations but dialects. Domain overlay (legal-specific constraints over generic support-triage), org overlay (company tone and compliance over base persona), user overlay (personal preferences over template) — the same deep-merge machinery composes all three into one resolved runtime spec.
reasoning: The overlay system is secretly a composition algebra and the team is only using one axis of it. Exposing dialects lets one support-triage template serve legal, medical, and fintech via three domain overlays; lets orgs enforce compliance overlays across all their personas; and lets users maintain personal preference overlays that survive template upgrades. Same code, one level higher.
